alerts.command_timeout: {drive} recorded {count} new command timeout event(s) since the previous scan.
alerts.critical_temperature_time_increase: {drive} accumulated {count} new minute(s) above its critical temperature.
alerts.drive_missing: {drive} has been missing for {count} consecutive scans.
alerts.error_log_increase: {drive} recorded {count} new SMART error-log entry or entries.
alerts.health_failed: {drive} reports a failed SMART health check.
alerts.interface_crc: {drive} recorded {count} new interface CRC error(s) since the previous scan; check its data cable and connectors.
alerts.media_errors: {drive} recorded {count} new media/data integrity error(s) since the previous scan.
alerts.pending: {drive} recorded {count} new pending sector(s) since the previous scan.
alerts.reallocated: {drive} recorded {count} newly reallocated sector(s) since the previous scan.
alerts.smart_unavailable: Full SMART data is unavailable for {drive}.
alerts.spin_retry: {drive} recorded {count} new spindle spin retry event(s) since the previous scan.
alerts.storage_critical: {drive} mounted storage is critically full at {used}%.
alerts.temperature_cooling: {drive} is cooling at {temperature} °C; the alert clears below {threshold} °C.
alerts.test_body: Notifications are working. This is only a test; no drive issue was created.
alerts.uncorrectable: {drive} recorded {count} new uncorrectable error(s) since the previous scan.
alerts.unsafe_shutdown_increase: {drive} recorded {count} new unsafe shutdown(s) since the previous scan.
alerts.warning_temperature_time_increase: {drive} accumulated {count} new minute(s) above its warning temperature.

collector.basic_features: Drive discovery, mounted folders, storage use, and temperatures exposed by Linux.
collector.full_features: Reliable health, endurance, error counters, sensor details, and background self-test progress.
collector.pause_terminal_opened: A terminal opened. Review the command and approve sudo to stop the collector timer.
collector.remove_confirm: Click Remove collector again to open the explicit privileged uninstall command.
collector.settings_hint: Enable or disable Full SMART from Settings → Plugins → Drive Health. Privileged actions always open a terminal for review.
collector.settings_opened: Opened the Plugins page. Select the gear on Drive Health to change its settings.
collector.start_terminal_opened: A terminal opened. Review the command and approve sudo to enable and refresh the collector.
collector.status_disabled: Basic mode is active; the optional system collector is not being used.
collector.status_healthy: Collector {version} is installed and refreshing full SMART data.
collector.status_not_installed: Install the read-only collector to unlock full SMART data.
collector.status_stale: The collector is installed, but its cache is stale or unavailable.
collector.status_upgrade_required: Collector {version} is outdated; upgrade to the bundled version.
collector.terminal_opened: A terminal opened. Review the command and approve sudo to install or upgrade.
collector.title: System collector
collector.uninstall_terminal_opened: A terminal opened. Review the removal command and approve sudo to continue.
collector.update_body: Full SMART is enabled. Update collector {current} to {expected} from the Drive Health panel to keep all features working.

dependencies.alert_body: Install the missing dependencies to enable complete monitoring: {missing}. Open the Drive Health panel to review the command.
dependencies.collection_blocked: Drive collection is paused because required commands are missing: {missing}
dependencies.install_body: A terminal is opening with the suggested command. Review it and approve the sudo and package-manager prompts to continue.
dependencies.manual_install: No supported package manager with sudo was detected. Install the listed commands manually, then recheck.
dependencies.title: Required dependencies are missing

panel.title: Drive Health
panel.waiting: Waiting for the first drive scan…

preferences.invalid_thresholds: Enter numeric thresholds and keep critical temperature above warning temperature.
preferences.save_failed: Drive preferences could not be saved.
preferences.title: Drive preferences

self_test.authorization_required: Polkit (pkexec) is required for background self-tests. Install your distribution's polkit package.
self_test.authorization_timeout: Administrator approval timed out. Try again when you are ready to approve it.
self_test.confirm: Start a {type} SMART self-test in the background? Your desktop will request administrator approval.
self_test.helper_required: Install or upgrade the system collector to enable explicitly approved self-tests.
self_test.launch_failed: The background self-test could not be started.
self_test.log_failure: The SMART self-test log contains a relevant failed test.
self_test.started_background: The self-test is running in the background. Progress and the final result will update here.
self_test.starting: Request accepted; waiting for the drive to report progress…
self_test.title: SMART self-test

alert_hdd.description: Evaluate rotational disks for temperature, SMART health, sector, spindle, timeout, and interface alerts.
alert_hdd.label: Alert on hard drives

alerts_enabled.description: Notify when a new drive issue appears or an existing issue worsens.
alerts_enabled.label: Desktop alerts

critical_temperature.description: Temperature in °C that changes a drive to critical color.
critical_temperature.label: Critical temperature

drive_missing_alerts.description: Warn when an established internal drive disappears for several scans.
drive_missing_alerts.label: Missing-drive alerts

history_interval_minutes.description: Minutes between persisted temperature and endurance samples.
history_interval_minutes.label: History sample interval

history_retention_days.description: Days of bounded drive trend history to retain.
history_retention_days.label: History retention

life_warning_percent.description: Remaining SSD life percentage that triggers a warning.
life_warning_percent.label: Endurance warning

missing_grace_scans.description: Consecutive successful scans a drive may be absent before an alert appears.
missing_grace_scans.label: Missing-drive grace scans

notify_recovery.description: Notify when a previously active drive issue clears.
notify_recovery.label: Recovery notifications

refresh_seconds.description: Seconds between plugin refreshes. The optional root collector refreshes its cache every 30 seconds independently.
refresh_seconds.label: Refresh interval

show_hdd.description: Display rotational disks with HDD-specific health and integrity information.
show_hdd.label: Show hard drives

system_collector_enabled.description: Use the separately authorized read-only system collector for reliable health, endurance, error counters, sensor details, and self-test progress. Turning this off ignores its cache but does not stop an installed timer; stop it from the Drive Health collector controls.
system_collector_enabled.label: Full SMART collector (optional)

use_hotspot_temperature.description: Use the hottest valid NVMe sensor for summary colors and temperature alerts.
use_hotspot_temperature.label: Use hottest sensor

warning_temperature.description: Temperature in °C that changes a drive to warning color.
warning_temperature.label: Warning temperature

smart.access_limited: Temperature and storage are available; health and full SMART details require the read-only system collector.
smart.partial_body: Full SMART details available for {available} of {total} drives.
smart.partial_details: Core health is available, but at least one optional SMART section could not be read.
smart.sleeping: Drive is sleeping; SMART checks were skipped to avoid spinning it up.

widget.smart_unavailable: Full SMART access unavailable for {count} drive(s)
widget.tooltip: {count} drives ({ssds} SSD, {hdds} HDD) • hottest {temperature} • lowest SSD life {remaining}
